info.name: 🛡️ ALdeci — COMPLY
info.description:
## Comply — "Can I prove we're secure?"

Covers: Compliance Dashboard, Evidence Vault, Evidence Export, SOC2, SLSA, Audit Trail, Reports, Analytics

### Personas Served
- **Maria Santos** (Compliance Manager) — frameworks, evidence, SOC2
- **Laura Chen** (GRC Analyst) — risk quantification, gap analysis
- **Tom Baker** (External Auditor) — audit trail, evidence bundles
- **Sarah Chen** (CISO) — compliance posture, executive reports
- **Janet Kim** (SOC Manager) — policy enforcement, monitoring

### Endpoints: 70+ covering audit, evidence, reports, policies, compliance, marketplace

### Vision Pillars: V6 (Quantum-Secure Evidence), V10 (CTEM with Crypto Proof)

item.name: 📋 Audit Trail & Chain
item.description: Immutable audit logs with chain verification — full WORM compliance.

item.name: 🔐 Evidence Vault (V6 — Quantum-Secure)
item.description: Signed evidence bundles with RSA+ML-DSA hybrid signatures. FIPS 204 compliant.

item.name: 📜 Policy Engine
item.description: Security policy CRUD, validation, simulation, and enforcement.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "No Critical Vulns in Production",
  "description": "Block deployments with critical or high severity unresolved vulnerabilities",
  "severity_threshold": "high",
  "enforcement": "block",
  "scope": [
    "production"
  ],
  "exceptions": [],
  "auto_create_ticket": true,
  "type": "vulnerability",
  "policy_type": "vulnerability_threshold"
}
